name: ttmevolve-electron
description: TTMEvolve desktop Agent — Electron + Python backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: cd electron && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist: npm run build && cd electron && electron-builder
